name: Article Content
description: Long-form article layout with sticky table-of-contents sidebar. Used for documentation, blog posts, and content-heavy pages.

slots.toc-sidebar: Sticky nav list in a 3-column sidebar with _colSpan3, built from heading anchors
slots.article: Main content area with _colSpan9, containing prose Text and Card sections
slots.author: Card at article end with Avatar, bio Text, and links, preceded by Separator

command-center.notes: ToC headings use cc-label. Active ToC item gets cc-glow. Article headings use cc-label. Code blocks use cc-scanline with cc-data for line numbers.
